title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: We are looking for a Machine Learning Engineer to design, build and productionize ML models. You will work closely with data scientists and software engineers to build scalable ML pipelines.

title: Data Scientist
description: Join our data science team to analyze large datasets, build predictive models, and communicate insights to stakeholders. You will work on real-world business problems across multiple industries.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Design and build high-performance, scalable backend services. You will architect APIs, optimize databases, and work in a fast-paced startup environment.

title: AI/NLP Engineer
description: Build cutting-edge NLP systems and LLM-powered applications. Work on text classification, information extraction, RAG systems, and conversational AI.

title: Data Engineer
description: Build robust data pipelines and infrastructure to power analytics and ML teams. You will design ETL processes, manage data warehouses, and ensure data quality.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Build end-to-end web applications with modern tech stack. Own features from database to UI, collaborate with product managers and designers.

title: Cloud Engineer
description: Design and maintain cloud infrastructure on AWS/Azure. Implement CI/CD pipelines, manage Kubernetes clusters, and drive DevOps best practices.

title: Generative AI Developer
description: Build production-grade GenAI applications leveraging large language models, RAG pipelines, and agent frameworks. Design prompt engineering strategies and evaluate model outputs.

title: Computer Vision Engineer
description: Develop computer vision solutions for object detection, segmentation, and image classification. Deploy models at scale using modern MLOps tooling.

title: Business Intelligence Analyst
description: Design BI dashboards, write complex SQL queries, and translate data into business insights. Partner with stakeholders across finance, marketing, and operations.
